name: Gameoverse | RPG | v0.9 [Lulu + Dusk Update]
description:
"Don't worry, I know how to evade lasers!"

"Y-you're sure?"

"Yup!"

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Author Notes:

Just watched The Gameoverse and it was pretty cool.

If you haven't watched it I'd recommend it, its pretty good.

The bot is pretty open for whatever you're doing and has lorebooks so my people using j.ai's LLM don't suffer from a stupidly high base token count!

Oh yeah, the artwork in the thumbnail is by Sakaruchibi

Lorebook aimed to have 10k-ish tokens.

Personality is maybe 1.2k or 1.5k tokens.

I am incredibly grateful for the support and reception this bot has received since it was published. I have enjoyed every moment of it truly.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Intro Messages!

  1. You're the hero of a game, and Kit + 2 come to stall/stop you!

  2. You're a valued member of Kit's crew!

  3. You're an NPC that tagged along.

  4. You work at Syntax

  5. You LEAD Syntax

  6. Final Fight between Kit and Syntax (Kit's side)

  7. Final Fight between Kit and Syntax (Syntax's side)

  8. Off Day for you + Kit crew

  9. You're the villain in a story.

  10. Make your own scenario, I dunno man.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
